findings.title: Loan appraisal overrides not independently reviewed
findings.summary: Manual overrides on loan limits are applied without a second-person review, so a single officer can approve outside policy.
findings.actionPlan: Introduce a mandatory second-person review for any override above the policy limit, evidenced in the core system.

findings.title: Privileged user access not reviewed quarterly
findings.summary: Administrator accounts in the core banking system have not had a documented access review in the last two quarters.
findings.actionPlan: Run a quarterly privileged-access review with sign-off, and remove dormant administrator accounts.

findings.title: Records of processing incomplete for member data
findings.summary: The record of processing activities does not cover all systems that hold member personal data, which is a gap against the Data Protection Act.
findings.actionPlan: Complete the record of processing across all member-data systems and assign an owner to keep it current.

findings.title: Daily cash reconciliation evidence not retained
findings.summary: Branch cash counts are performed but the signed reconciliation is not consistently filed, so the control cannot be evidenced.
findings.actionPlan: Store the signed daily reconciliation in the system within one working day of the count.

findings.title: Supplier onboarding lacks conflict-of-interest check
findings.summary: New suppliers are added without a documented conflict-of-interest declaration from the requesting staff member.
findings.actionPlan: Add a short conflict-of-interest declaration to supplier onboarding, retained with the supplier record.

findings.title: Board pack issued without remediation status
findings.summary: An earlier board pack omitted the status of open remediation actions, reducing the board's visibility of overdue items.
findings.actionPlan: Include a remediation status summary in every board pack. Closed: the latest pack now includes it.

workpapers.title: Loan override testing
workpapers.body: Sample of 25 overrides in the period. 6 were applied by a single officer with no evidence of a second review. Policy requires a second-person review above the limit. Result: control not operating as designed.

workpapers.title: Privileged access review
workpapers.body: Reviewed administrator accounts in the core system. No documented access review for two quarters. Two accounts belonged to leavers. Result: access governance gap.

workpapers.title: Records of processing walkthrough
workpapers.body: Walked through the record of processing against the systems inventory. Three systems holding member data were not listed. Result: incomplete record against the Data Protection Act.

boardItems.title: High-risk findings this quarter
boardItems.note: Two high-risk items open, both with owners and dates. Sample data.

boardItems.title: Remediation progress
boardItems.note: 72% of actions on track, 5 overdue. Sample data.

boardItems.title: Data protection readiness
boardItems.note: Records of processing being completed ahead of an ODPC review. Sample data.

boardItems.title: Internal audit plan coverage
boardItems.note: Plan is 60% delivered for the year. Sample data.
